---
name: Good first PR
about: Small, well-scoped contribution tasks for first-time contributors
title: "[Good First PR] "
labels: "good first issue,help wanted"
assignees: ""
---

## Goal
Describe the improvement in one or two sentences.

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Suggested Files
- `path/to/file.py`
- `path/to/file.md`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Change is implemented with minimal scope
- [ ] Behavior/docs are clear and correct
- [ ] Related tests pass or are updated
- [ ] Documentation updated if user-facing behavior changed

## Implementation Notes
Provide any constraints, examples, or links that reduce ambiguity.

## Estimated Effort
- [ ] 15-30 minutes
- [ ] 30-60 minutes
- [ ] 60-90 minutes

## Validation Checklist
- [ ] I can describe how to verify this locally
- [ ] I listed exact files to touch
- [ ] I listed what "done" means
